summary: First end-to-end MVP test of HireFast. 20/20 backend pytest cases passed (including Claude conversation + scoring via emergentintegrations). Frontend Welcome (21 cards), TestRunner first question (1/38 Sentence Repetition), Admin login, all 5 sidebar routes, Questions page (21 section tabs), and Settings page (21 toggles+inputs) all render and function correctly.

design_issues.screen: Admin Dashboard - Average score per section chart
issues: Only sections with completed sessions show bars (correct behavior); chart x-axis labels are heavily rotated/overlapping for 21 sections — consider horizontal bar chart or larger height for readability.
All 21 rows render but there is no visual grouping/numbering separator between voice/typing/AI sections; minor UX nit.

action_items: (Optional) Add data-testid attributes to dynamic items: Questions section tabs (e.g., data-testid="qtab-{key}") and Settings rows (e.g., data-testid="setting-row-{key}", "setting-enabled-{key}", "setting-timer-{key}", "setting-per-{key}") to make future automation deterministic.
(Optional) Improve Dashboard 'Average score per section' chart label rotation/spacing — currently x-labels are crowded for 21 sections.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~770 lines — still acceptable but approaching limit. If more admin features are added, split into routers/admin.py, routers/candidate.py, services/scoring.py.
/api/test/conversation: history is rebuilt as a string and replayed each turn rather than using LlmChat's session memory. Works but doubles tokens — fine for MVP.

/api/test/complete: Claude scoring prompt truncates JSON via slicing (eval_items[:12000], convo_items[:6000]). For sessions with many responses this can cut off mid-object causing JSON parse fallback. Consider per-item summarization or streaming evaluation.
/api/admin/login: bcrypt rounds use default (12). Acceptable; just confirm JWT_SECRET is rotated in prod (.env contains a placeholder marked 'change-in-prod').
Dynamic UI elements (Questions tabs, Settings rows) lack data-testid — flagged above.
MongoDB ObjectId is correctly excluded everywhere ({_id:0}) — good.
All admin routes correctly require Bearer JWT — verified.
test_credentials: admin@test.com / admin123 (from /app/memory/test_credentials.md). Candidate: any name + valid email format.
seed_data_creation: Tests use TEST_-prefixed emails (e.g. TEST_<uuid>@example.com) and one TEST_ vocabulary question that is created/updated/deleted in the same test (no leftovers). HR review and session-completion fixtures leave a few TEST_ candidate sessions in DB intentionally for downstream verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all 21-section meta, candidate flow (start/response/conversation/complete with real Claude call), admin login + JWT guard, dashboard, questions CRUD, candidates list + detail, HR review, settings GET/PUT/reset. Run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. Typical run time ~7s but the /test/complete test can take up to 60s when Claude responds slowly. Voice (SpeechRecognition) sections cannot be automated in headless browser — only the section card render was verified for the first question (Sentence Repetition card visible with Play audio button on /test/:id).
rca of the issue: No bugs found in this iteration. All MVP success criteria met.
